accept.reason: flutter and node genuinely apply here but the pack fingerprints look for a repo-root pubspec.yaml / package.json, while this monorepo keeps them in app/ and functions/ — so detect() can't see them and the declaration is deliberately ahead of the root-only fingerprint. (executable-requirements and firebase are intentionally NOT declared yet: they don't exist in the mounted corpus until the Claudinite pack PR merges and .claudinite/ re-syncs, at which point they fingerprint-match on dev/requirements/requirements.md and firebase.json and need no acceptance.)
